messages.content: Add markdown cell to notebook please
Implement connection pooling with queue for waiters

tool_use.name: BashTool
tool_use.input: node -e "class Pool{constructor(size,create){this.size=size;this.pool=[];this.waiting=[];this.create=create;}async acquire(){if(this.pool.length)return this.pool.pop();if(this.waiting.length<this.size)return await this.create();return new Promise(r=>this.waiting.push(r));}release(c){const w=this.waiting.shift();if(w)w.resolve(c);else this.pool.push(c);}}console.log('Pool ready')"
